*Auto-Resolved (2):*
These issues had Sentry events in the last 24h but the error condition no longer exists in the current codebase.

- :white_check_mark: *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1B|MIT-MAP-1B: Invalid UUID "" on /dashboard>* — DEV-918 was completed 2026-07-01; `resolveDashboardBrand` now guards `!userId`. Event at 00:12 was from an older E2E build (release `53f6cd3` predates fix commit `3bff21b`). Existing ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-918/fix-invalid-empty-string-uuid-error-on-dashboard-page-load|DEV-918> (Done)
- :white_check_mark: *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-C|MIT-MAP-C: Share-card OG layout error (missing display:flex)>* — Current `src/lib/growth/share-card.tsx` (updated in DEV-925, commit `a1043e4`) has `display: flex` on all container divs; Satori constraint no longer triggered.

:large_yellow_circle: *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-31|MIT-MAP-31: Error: failed to pipe response @ /opengraph-image>*
Events: 5   ·   New   ·   Severity: Moderate
Root cause: `@vercel/og` crashes in `parseFvarAxis` reading index `256` as undefined — the `NotoSansTC-subset.ttf` font has a malformed `fvar` table. Investigate the subset font and regenerate or strip the fvar table.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-927/fix-og-image-crash-vercelog-fails-to-parse-notosanstc-subset-font-fvar|DEV-927> — Fix OG image crash: @vercel/og fails to parse NotoSansTC subset font   ·   Priority: High   ·   Labels: Bug, M

:large_yellow_circle: *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-C|MIT-MAP-C: Error: failed to pipe response @ /api/share-card/[slug]>*
Events: 2 (24h) / 9 total   ·   Recurring   ·   Severity: Moderate   ·   Validation: Auto-resolved
Root cause resolved in DEV-925 (`a1043e4`): all container divs in `share-card.tsx` now have `display: flex`. No ticket created.
Ticket: _Not ticketed — auto-resolved in current codebase_

:large_yellow_circle: *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-20|MIT-MAP-20: SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input @ /_error>*
Events: 1 (24h) / 2 total   ·   Recurring   ·   Severity: Moderate
Root cause: Next.js manifest file (`.next/` build artifact) read as empty/truncated JSON during page load — likely a hot-reload race or E2E test startup timing issue. Inconclusive from source alone; investigate dev server + E2E startup sequencing.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-928/investigate-recurring-nextjs-manifest-json-parse-error-on-page-render|DEV-928> — Investigate recurring Next.js manifest JSON parse error on page render   ·   Priority: High   ·   Labels: Bug, M

*Noise (1 — not ticketed)*

- :white_circle: *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-8|MIT-MAP-8: Error: aborted @ abortIncoming(node:_http_server)>*   ·   1 event (24h) / 28 total   ·   Recurring   ·   Seer actionability: super_low
  TCP-level client disconnect handled at Node.js internals level. Expected behavior when a client closes the connection before the response completes. No action needed.

- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-928/investigate-recurring-nextjs-manifest-json-parse-error-on-page-render|DEV-928> — Investigate recurring Next.js manifest JSON parse error on page render   (Priority: High, Bug, M)
